title: assignment did not succeed in always_ff when clk_gated driven
body:
Hello，assignment did not succeed in code below when translation to systemc


258    always_ff @(posedge clk_gated, negedge rst_n)
259    begin
260       if(rst_n == 1'b0)
261       begin
262       for (i=0; i< DATA_DEPTH; i++)
263          FIFO_REGISTERS[i] <= {DATA_WIDTH {1'b0}};
264       end
265       else
266       begin
267          if((grant_o == 1'b1) && (valid_i == 1'b1))
268             FIFO_REGISTERS[Push_Pointer_CS] <= data_i;
269       end
270    end

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/43007864/83592922-0f5e5180-a58e-11ea-8d93-a2e568ee7dc5.png)



it it found under master version

wave below is simulated using vcs & verdi
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/43007864/83593324-0c179580-a58f-11ea-9c2b-5122adafac10.png)
